research.title: wp2shell hits WordPress: detecting pre-auth RCE from plugin drop to command execution
research.summary: On July 17, 2026, Searchlight Cyber disclosed wp2shell , a pre-authentication remote code execution chain in WordPress Core ( CVE-2026-63030 , CVE-2026-60137 ). Proof-of-concept tools hit GitHub within hours. hashkitten published the chain after PoCs started.

research.title: CVE-2026-60167, CVE-2026-60168, CVE-2026-60169 & CVE-2026-60170 | Oracle Hospitality Simphony Multiple Vulnerabilities
research.summary: Oracle’s July 2026 Critical Patch Update addresses four remotely exploitable vulnerabilities affecting Oracle Hospitality Simphony. Discovered and responsibly disclosed by Horizon3.ai researcher Jimi Sebree, the vulnerabilities affect two Simphony.

research.title: RefluXFS: A Linux Kernel Local Privilege Escalation to Root in XFS (CVE-2026-64600)
research.summary: Executive summary Qualys Threat Research Unit (TRU) identified CVE-2026-64600, a race condition in the Linux kernel’s XFS filesystem copy-on-write path. An attacker with an ordinary local account can exploit this race condition to overwrite protected files.

research.title: Next chapter: Restructuring GitHub’s bug bounty program
research.summary: The security research community makes GitHub safer for everyone. That’s the simple idea behind our bug bounty program. For more than a decade, researchers from around the world have helped us find and fix vulnerabilities before they could be exploited, and.

research.title: Oracle Critical Patch Update, July 2026 Security Update Review
research.summary: Oracle released its third quarterly edition of this year’s Critical Patch Update. The update received patches for 1449 security vulnerabilities. Some of the vulnerabilities addressed in this update impact more than one product. These patches address.

research.title: Escape from AppleScript: Even folder names can be user input
research.summary: OpenInTerminal is a popular macOS utility written in Swift that enhances the Finder by allowing users to quickly open the current directory in their preferred terminal application. It achieves this by integrating with the Finder's toolbar and context menu..

vulns.title: — Langflow OSS Unauthenticated RCE
vulns.summary: IBM Langflow OSS 1.0.0 through 1.10.0 allows unauthenticated attackers to chain /api/v1/auto_login (mints SUPERUSER tokens to any network caller) with /api/v1/validate/code (executes user code via exec()) to achieve full RCE on.
vulns.technicalSummary: IBM Langflow OSS 1.0.0 through 1.10.0 allows unauthenticated attackers to chain /api/v1/auto_login (mints SUPERUSER tokens to any network caller) with /api/v1/validate/code (executes user code via exec()) to achieve full RCE on.

vulns.exploitSyntax:
# authorized lab / owned targets only
git clone https://github.com/oscerd/CVE-2026-48205
cd CVE-2026-48205
java -jar <poc>.jar https://<authorized-target>
# confirm exact flags in the linked GitHub README before validation
chains: initial access through exposed the affected product
internal pivot from an internet-facing control point
lateral movement if secrets or management access are recovered
vulns.weaponized: Likely worth tracking because public tooling exists and recent source activity was observed.
